primary_objective: maximize unsafe-case recall or minimize false-negative risk under prospectively frozen threshold selection
threshold_policy: future thresholds must be selected inside authorized training folds only; D017/D018 held-out outcomes cannot tune an active threshold
next_required_decision: D021 implementation and synthetic validation only, or manuscript discussion stop
claim_boundary: Future recall-first safety freeze proposal only; no implementation, threshold application, fitting, locked-data access, mission-loop work, Gate 5 reinterpretation, QML invention, quantum advantage, or Gate 6.
